---
title: "Exploratory plot 2"
author: "Minh Tri Ngo"
format: pdf
---

#Packages 
```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(janitor)
library(ggrepel)
library(cowplot)
library(here)
library(ggtext)
library(flextable)
```

- to do: 
- add caption to fig 4
- change labels and data to remove sheep but keep fire
- add figure captions and annotations
- do the gen ai declaration google form 
- do final check

# Data/Cleaning
```{r}
weather <- read_csv(here("data", "raw", "NOAA-weather-data.csv"))
# creating new object from weather
weather_clean <- weather |> 
  # cleaning column names
  clean_names() |> 
  # making sure date is in POSIXct format
  mutate(date = mdy(date)) |> 
  # selecting columns of interest
  select(date, prcp, tmax, tmin) |> 
  # extracting month and year from date column
  mutate(month = month(date),
         year = year(date)) |> 
  # assigning water year
  mutate(wy = case_when(
    # when month is October or later, assign value of year + 1
    month >= 10 ~ year + 1,
    # when month is September or earlier, assign value of existing year
    .default = year))
```

# Calculating Total Mean Annual Precipitation
```{r}
# new obj
 tmap <- weather_clean |>
  # group by year
  group_by(year) |>
  # calculate total annual precip
  summarize(total_precip = sum(prcp, na.rm = TRUE)) |> 
  # ungroup 
  ungroup()
```

# Join grasses_summary with tmap
```{r}
# new obj
precip_veg <- full_join(
  # left
  x = tmap, 
  # right
  y = grasses_summary,
  # shared column
  by = c("year" = "year") 
) |> 
  # selecting relevant columns
  select(year, grand_mean_pc, cover_category, total_precip, se) |> 
  # remove NAs and year 2020
  filter(!is.na(grand_mean_pc), !is.na(total_precip), year != 2020)
```


## Plotting

## Total Annual Precip vs Grand Mean % Cover Native
```{r}
#| label: plotting precip and cover category changes
#| message: false
#| echo: false
#| fig-width: 8
#| fig-height: 4
#| fig-cap: " Changes in grand mean percent cover for native and non-native cover categories on NCOS Mesa from 2021-2025. Individual points show grand mean percent cover for each year. Dark grey line shows trendline; blue line represents native cover; orange represents non-native cover; dotted line represents total annual precipitation. As an exploratory visualization, this figure suggests that precipitation is a factor that increases non-native percent cover while precipitation doesn't increase native percent cover."


TAPnat <- ggplot(data = precip_veg,
       # x axis is year, y axis is grand mean % cover, color is cover category
       mapping = aes(x = year,
                     y = grand_mean_pc,
                     color = cover_category)) +
  # first layer: points for year and grand mean % cover
  geom_point() +
  # second layer: lines to connect points
  geom_line() +
  # trend line
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, aes(linetype = "Trend Line", color = "Trend Line")) +
  # add precipitation as secondary y axis scaled to grand mean % cover range
  geom_line(aes(y = total_precip / max(precip_veg$total_precip, na.rm = TRUE) *
                    max(precip_veg$grand_mean_pc, na.rm = TRUE),
                color = "Total Precipitation"),
            linetype = "dashed") +
  # facet wrap to display cover category
  facet_wrap(~cover_category) +
  # add color for cover categories, precipitation, and trend line
  scale_color_manual(name = "Legend",
                     values = c("NATIVE COVER" = "#005AB5",
                                "NON-NATIVE COVER" = "#DC3220",
                                "Total Precipitation" = "#228B22",
                                "Trend Line" = "gray30"),
                     labels = c("Native", "Non-native", "Total Precipitation", "Trend Line")) +
  scale_linetype_manual(name = "Legend",
                        values = c("Trend Line" = "solid")) +
  # merge into one legend, suppress separate linetype legend
  guides(color = guide_legend(override.aes = list(linetype = c("solid", "solid", "dashed", "solid"),
                                                   shape = c(16, 16, NA, NA))),
         linetype = "none") +
  # dual y axes
  scale_y_continuous(
    name = "Grand Mean Percent Cover (%)",
    sec.axis = sec_axis(
      ~ . * max(precip_veg$total_precip, na.rm = TRUE) /
            max(precip_veg$grand_mean_pc, na.rm = TRUE),
      name = "Total Annual Precipitation (in)"
    )
  ) +
  # labels
  labs(
    title = "Precipitation and grand mean % cover of native and nonnative cover",
    x = "Year") +
  theme_bw()

TAPnat

```
